subsidyType: citywide replacement program supported by ratepayers state funding and foundation support
publicSideCovered: yes the city funds the public-side replacement work
privateSideCovered: yes qualifying customer-side lines are replaced at no charge in the city program
propertyRules: homes with lead lines or likely lead lines are prioritized through the utility lookup and replacement schedule
contractorRules: city staff and contractors coordinate replacement restoration and post-replacement testing
